_doc: Shadowmoor (SHM) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/shm.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 121C / 80U / 80R / 0M. Collation: sequential, four common runs. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Occasional foil (1:56) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Large set. Printed in USA only (Belgian Shadowmoor unknown). 36 packs per box. Booster has an ad card (counted separately from the 15 game cards). No basic land in booster. Tournament packs described but not modelled.
